languages.text: "Давно пора признать, что у династии один Вольный Торговец, и это — я".
"It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."
languages.original_text: "Давно пора признать, что у династии один Вольный Торговец, и это — я".

traits.locale_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

languages.text: “是时候承认现实了。这王朝只有一个行商浪人，那就是我。”
languages.original_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

traits.locale_text: “是时候承认现实了。这王朝只有一个行商浪人，那就是我。”

languages.text: «Es hora de que aceptemos que la dinastía solo tiene un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente, y es{mf|e|a} soy yo».
languages.original_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

traits.locale_text: «Es hora de que aceptemos que la dinastía solo tiene un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente, y es{mf|e|a} soy yo».

languages.text: « Il était grand temps que nous reconnaissions que cette dynastie ne compte qu'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. Moi. »
languages.original_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

traits.locale_text: « Il était grand temps que nous reconnaissions que cette dynastie ne compte qu'{mf|un libre-marchand|une libre-marchande}. Moi. »

languages.text: "Hanedanın tek bir Hür Tacir'i olduğunu ve onun da ben olduğumu kabul etmemizin zamanı geldi."
languages.original_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

traits.locale_text: "Hanedanın tek bir Hür Tacir'i olduğunu ve onun da ben olduğumu kabul etmemizin zamanı geldi."

languages.text: "Es wird höchste Zeit, zu akzeptieren, dass die Dynastie nur {mf|einen Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} hat. Mich."
languages.original_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

traits.locale_text: "Es wird höchste Zeit, zu akzeptieren, dass die Dynastie nur {mf|einen Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} hat. Mich."

languages.text: 「この王朝には、ただ1人のローグトレーダーがいる。それは私だ」と認める時が来た。
languages.original_text: "It is high time we acknowledged that the dynasty has only one Rogue Trader, and that is me."

traits.locale_text: 「この王朝には、ただ1人のローグトレーダーがいる。それは私だ」と認める時が来た。
